html:
Spicy Vegetable Stinger is a Crock Pot Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It requires either a Radish/Asparagus, an Ice, and 1.5 additional Vegetables (total vegetable value of the recipe = 2.5 including Radish/Asparagus or Toma Root in Don't Starve Together). It takes 10 seconds to cook. Because it requires 4 ingredients to make, there cannot be fillers.

When consumed, it restores 3 , 25 and 33 , and takes 15 days to spoil.

In Don't Starve Together, Spicy Vegetable Stinger is replaced by Vegetable Stinger. It requires either a Toma Root or Asparagus, an Ice, and 1.5 additional Vegetables. Its color is a little lighter. It is Winona's favorite dish, making it restore an additional 15 points of hunger for a total of 40 hunger for her.

Recipe

×1.5

×1.5

Filler cannot be Meats, Egg or Inedible.

Examples

Tips

  • If one does not have a reliable source of honey, this can be a reliable means for recovering sanity. However, the ingredients required can provide more hunger when cooked individually, so it's a trade-off one should consider when planning their diet.
  • In Don't Starve Together, if one has an Onion and a Toma Root, then Salsa Fresca should be considered instead of this dish, as it requires 0.5 less vegetable value, while having the same benefits.

Trivia

  • Vegetable Stinger was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Warly Character Update.
  • During the Pig Fiesta event in Hamlet, Spicy Vegetable Stinger takes on a more festive appearance.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord

–Wurt

–Walter
“A little something to sip on.”
–Wanda
Spicy Vegetable Stinger is a Crock Pot Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It requires either a Radish/Asparagus, an Ice, and 1.5 additional Vegetables (total vegetable value of the recipe = 2.5 including Radish/Asparagus or Toma Root in Don't Starve Together). It takes 10 seconds to cook. Because it requires 4 ingredients to make, there cannot be fillers.
When consumed, it restores 3 , 25 and 33 , and takes 15 days to spoil.
In Don't Starve Together, Spicy Vegetable Stinger is replaced by Vegetable Stinger. It requires either a Toma Root or Asparagus, an Ice, and 1.5 additional Vegetables. Its color is a little lighter. It is Winona's favorite dish, making it restore an additional 15 points of hunger for a total of 40 hunger for her.

Filler cannot be Meats, Egg or Inedible.

If one does not have a reliable source of honey, this can be a reliable means for recovering sanity. However, the ingredients required can provide more hunger when cooked individually, so it's a trade-off one should consider when planning their diet.
In Don't Starve Together, if one has an Onion and a Toma Root, then Salsa Fresca should be considered instead of this dish, as it requires 0.5 less vegetable value, while having the same benefits.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Vegetable Stinger was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Warly Character Update.
During the Pig Fiesta event in Hamlet, Spicy Vegetable Stinger takes on a more festive appearance.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cây Đốt Rau Cay là một Vật Phẩm Nồi Hầm độc quyền cho Hamlet DLC. Nó yêu cầu Củ cải/Măng tây, Đá và 1,5 loại Rau bổ sung (tổng giá trị rau của công thức = 2,5 bao gồm Củ cải/Măng tây hoặc Rễ Toma trong Don't Starve Together). Phải mất 10 giây để nấu ăn. Vì cần 4 nguyên liệu để làm nên không thể có chất độn.

A daily dose of vegetables restores the mental faculties. |wigfrid = Thy spicyness intrigues me nöt! |webber = It's a drink with vegetables in it. |walani = Cheers! |warly = Add a little spice. |woodlegs = Has the kick to't |wilba = HATH A FURY IN'T |wormwood = Tangy water |wheeler = It could be spicier. |winona = I could use one of these after a long day. |wortox = I can't decide if it's for sipping or souping. |wurt = Fancy spicy juice! |walter = I've never had a spicy drink before. |wanda = A little something to sip on. |choose = winona }} '''Spicy Vegetable Stinger''' is a [[Crock Pot]] [[Food]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It requires either a [[Radish]]/[[Asparagus]], an [[Ice]], and 1.5 additional [[Vegetables]] (total vegetable value of the recipe = 2.5 including [[Radish]]/[[Asparagus]] or [[Toma Root]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''). It takes 10 seconds to cook. Because it requires 4 ingredients to make, there cannot be fillers. When consumed, it restores 3 {{Hp}}, 25 {{Hunger}} and 33 {{Sanity}}, and takes 15 [[Day-Night Cycle|days]] to [[spoil]]. In ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', Spicy Vegetable Stinger is replaced by '''Vegetable Stinger'''. It requires either a [[Toma Root]] or [[Asparagus]], an [[Ice]], and 1.5 additional [[Vegetables]]. Its color is a little lighter. It is Winona's favorite dish, making it restore an additional 15 points of hunger for a total of 40 hunger for her. == {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe == {{Recipe |item1 = Asparaguses |item2 = Vegetables |count2 = 1.5 |item3 = Ice |tool = Crock Pot |result = Spicy Vegetable Stinger }} {{Recipe |item1 = Toma Roots |item2 = vegetables |count2 = 1.5 |item3 = Ice |tool = Crock Pot |result = Spicy Vegetable Stinger |note = Filler cannot be [[Meats]], [[Egg]] or [[Inedible]]. }} == Examples == {{Recipe |item1 = Asparagus |item2 = Carrot |item3 = Green Cap |item4 = Ice |tool = Crock Pot |result = Spicy Vegetable Stinger }} {{Recipe |item1 = Toma Root |item2 = Ice |item3 =Carrot |pot = yes |result = Spicy Vegetable Stinger |item4 = Carrot }} {{Recipe |item1 = Toma Root |item2 = Ice |item3 = Ripe Stone Fruit |item4 = Ripe Stone Fruit |tool = Crock Pot |result = Spicy Vegetable Stinger }} {{clear}} == {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * If one does not have a reliable source of [[honey]], this can be a reliable means for recovering sanity. However, the ingredients required can provide more [[hunger]] when cooked individually, so it's a trade-off one should consider when planning their diet. * In [[Don't Starve Together|''Don't Starve Together'']], if one has an [[Onion]] and a [[Toma Root]], then [[Salsa Fresca]] should be considered instead of this dish, as it requires 0.5 less vegetable value, while having the same benefits. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == [[File:Spicy Vegetable Stinger (Pig Fiesta).png|right]] * Vegetable Stinger was introduced to ''Don't Starve Together'' in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#July 25, 2019 - Warly Character Update|Warly Character Update]]. * During the [[Pig Fiesta]] event in ''Hamlet'', Spicy Vegetable Stinger takes on a more festive appearance. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Vegetable Stinger 128x128.png|Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord {{clear}} {{Crock Pot Food}} __NOTOC__ [[vi:Nước Ép Rau Củ Cay]] [[Category:Crock Pot Recipes]] [[Category:Healing]] [[Category:Sanity Boost]]
